title: phyllanthus oreichtitus
intro: Phyllanthus niruri, also known as Phyllanthus oreichtitus, is a tropical plant species native to various parts of the world, including Asia and Central and South America, and is commonly found in wetlands and coastal areas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus niruri include its ability to support liver health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms associated with jaundice and other liver-related conditions. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including decoctions and infusions, and has been studied for its potential in developing new treatments for various diseases.
